sentences.english: Do you prefer eating alone or with other people?
sentences.korean: 혼자 먹는 것과 다른 사람과 먹는 것 중 어느 것을 선호합니까?

sentences.english: I actually enjoy both depending on the situation but if I had to choose I'd prefer eating with others.
sentences.korean: 상황에 따라 둘 다 좋지만 꼭 고르라면 다른 사람과 먹는 것을 선호해요.

sentences.english: Sharing a meal is one of the oldest ways humans bond with each other.
sentences.korean: 식사를 나누는 것은 인간이 서로 유대를 쌓는 가장 오래된 방법 중 하나예요.

sentences.english: Some of my best conversations with friends have happened naturally over a casual dinner.
sentences.korean: 친구들과의 최고의 대화 중 일부는 가벼운 저녁 식사 중에 자연스럽게 일어났어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: A Person Who Has Influenced You

sentences.english: Also food just tastes better when you're enjoying it with people you care about.
sentences.korean: 또한 소중한 사람들과 함께 즐기면 음식이 그냥 더 맛있어요.

sentences.english: That said I do appreciate a quiet solo lunch once in a while when I need time to recharge and think.
sentences.korean: 그렇긴 해도 재충전하고 생각할 시간이 필요할 때 가끔 조용한 혼밥도 감사하게 여겨요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Why is empathy important in today's society?
